name: 100/120/150W Selectable UFO High Bay Lights – AC 120-277V CCT 5000K
description: Illuminate large spaces with precision and efficiency using our Wattage Selectable LED UFO High Bay Light . Designed for maximum performance and flexibility, this high bay fixture is perfect for warehouses, factories, retail stores, and gymnasiums. Its selectable wattage feature, durable construction, and energy-efficient design make it a reliable solution for a wide range of applications.
short_desc: Key Features: Wattage Selectable: Choose from 100W, 120W, or 150W to meet your specific lighting needs. Powerful Illumination: Provides bright, consistent light output to ensure clear visibility across expansive areas. Daylight Clarity: 5000K color temperature delivers crisp, vibrant daylight-quality lighting. Versatile Voltage Compatibility: Operates on AC 120-277V for broad electrical system support. Durable Construction: High-quality black housing ensures long-term performance and a sleek, modern aesthetic. Energy Efficiency: Advanced LED technology reduces energy consumption and maintenance costs. Easy Installation: User-friendly design simplifies setup, especially in high-ceiling environments. Indoor-Ready Protection: Engineered for indoor use in high bay settings (IP rated for dust and moisture resistance). Ideal Applications: Warehouses: Uniform, high-output lighting enhances safety and workflow. Factories: Bright, reliable illumination improves operational efficiency. Retail Spaces: Ensures optimal lighting for large-format stores and supermarkets. Gymnasiums: Perfect for sports and recreational facilities requiring even, glare-free light.
